The dream in TEARS contains the ostensible command, "Die," but under the steganographic covering is the Logos-word "Felix," which means precisely the opposite; it is embedded secretly in the surface picture of damnation. Thus, those not equipped by the Holy Spirit receive a "die" message; the ethers, a "live and prosper and be fruitful and multiply and be joyous and healthy," message, which was God's first command to man. I am not back in Biblical times, but somehow John & Daniel & I found ourselves in the same reality or time frame, an eternal unchanging world above & beyond time.
